goal: Add time and selection display controls with selectable display formats to the existing Timeline toolbar, and expose the centered auto-scroll mode in the visible UI.
constraints: Modify only src/renderer/src/components/Timeline.tsx unless a tiny adjacent import/type adjustment is strictly required.
Build on the existing Timeline toolbar instead of redesigning the whole toolbar system.
Keep the current Omega dark look and the existing transport, snap, grouping, and export controls.
Store the chosen time and selection display formats locally so they survive reloads.
Add a visible way to choose the auto-scroll mode including a centered mode, while preserving existing playback behavior.
Keep the implementation conservative and scoped; do not attempt the full draggable toolbar-manager architecture in this task.
success_criteria: The Timeline toolbar shows a current time display and a selection-duration display.
Each display has a dropdown with multiple formats including hh:mm:ss variants, samples, and frame-based formats.
The chosen formats are persisted locally.
The visible UI exposes the auto-scroll mode including a centered option.
